name: Natural Fleckerl
preceding_figure_names: Contra Check, Natural Fleckerl, Natural Turn
following_figure_names: Natural Fleckerl (normal; or 1-3 Natural Fleckerl, 4-6 Natural Turn)
notes:
Note:
The figure can commence anywhere where previous figure has ended.
It can rotate 1 up to 2 revolutions depending on the couple.
For both Man and Lady, there is a strong rotation, so there must be a foot swivel on the ball of the flat foot on each step.
Middle of body forward, side to Man. Shaping is not as big as other dances, focus on rotation.

steps.action: to side and slightly forward with 1/2 weight, continue to turn on RF
continue to turn on RF and take full weight on RF, LF held behind RF
crosses behind LF, 1/2 weight (type of twist turn)
comments: Pull ab muscle, keep body lined up and forward. Do not stick butt out. No big shape.
Use twisting action through the ball of RF to allow the body momentum to carry on.

steps.action: Untwist on RF then LF to side, small step
comments: Keep momentum going. Keep L side fwd, but do not lift L elbow. Arm flat.
